title: Analytics
content_html:
Analytics

Start Here

  • Analytics Overview — boundaries, execution path, configuration, extension points, and weak spots.
  • Analytics Config JSON — route registry, catalogue inputs, tag-group order, and RAG policy.
  • Tag Source Data — the four canonical tag sources and their relationships.
  • Tag Services — read/write service architecture and safety boundary.

Tag Workflows

  • Tag Groups — read the group taxonomy.
  • Tag Registry — maintain canonical tags.
  • Tag Aliases — maintain shorthand and promote/demote vocabulary.
  • Series Tags — review coverage and manage offline assignment sessions.
  • Tag Editor — edit one series and its per-work overrides.

Retirement Position

Analytics no longer hosts document-package or tag-package workflows. Integrated Docs Viewer owns Share Document Packages; tag-package sharing was retired without replacement. The remaining Analytics tag routes stay in place until Tag Management In Studio moves their canonical data and write paths.

Paused Exploration

Tag Dimensions separates the unimplemented dimension/scoring concept, proposed architecture, and a possible first delivery. None is a current runtime contract.

Run

bin/local-analytics

Default route: http://127.0.0.1:8766/analytics/.
